_comment: Firebase project config, read by js/firebase-config.js (admin) and js/site-config.js (storefront) at page load. Copy this from Firebase Console -> Project Settings -> General -> Your apps -> SDK setup and configuration -> Config. IMPORTANT: this is NOT a secret — Firebase's apiKey is meant to be public in client-side apps (Google's own docs confirm this); it only identifies which Firebase project to talk to. The actual access control is firestore.rules (paste that into Firebase Console -> Firestore -> Rules) and, optionally, restricting this API key to your domain(s) in Google Cloud Console -> APIs & Services -> Credentials.
